name: nsfocus-ngfw-v60-9900
description: OctoBus package for NSFOCUS Next-generation Firewall NETCONF over SSH system status, address group, block, and unblock operations.

nsfocus.ngfw.v60_9900.NSFOCUSNGFWService.name: get-system-status
nsfocus.ngfw.v60_9900.NSFOCUSNGFWService.description: Query NSFOCUS NGFW system base status.

nsfocus.ngfw.v60_9900.NSFOCUSNGFWService.name: list-security-logs
nsfocus.ngfw.v60_9900.NSFOCUSNGFWService.description: Read logs from the NETCONF Syslog log buffer.

nsfocus.ngfw.v60_9900.NSFOCUSNGFWService.name: list-security-policies
nsfocus.ngfw.v60_9900.NSFOCUSNGFWService.description: Read IPv4 or IPv6 security policy rules.

nsfocus.ngfw.v60_9900.NSFOCUSNGFWService.name: list-security-policy-address-objects
nsfocus.ngfw.v60_9900.NSFOCUSNGFWService.description: Read source and destination address groups referenced by security policy rules.

nsfocus.ngfw.v60_9900.NSFOCUSNGFWService.name: create-node-object
nsfocus.ngfw.v60_9900.NSFOCUSNGFWService.description: Create a NETCONF IPv4 address group.

nsfocus.ngfw.v60_9900.NSFOCUSNGFWService.name: delete-node-object
nsfocus.ngfw.v60_9900.NSFOCUSNGFWService.description: Delete a NETCONF IPv4 address group by name.

nsfocus.ngfw.v60_9900.NSFOCUSNGFWService.name: block-ip
nsfocus.ngfw.v60_9900.NSFOCUSNGFWService.description: Add IP host entries into a NETCONF IPv4 address group.

nsfocus.ngfw.v60_9900.NSFOCUSNGFWService.name: unblock-ip
nsfocus.ngfw.v60_9900.NSFOCUSNGFWService.description: Remove IP host entries from a NETCONF IPv4 address group.

nsfocus.ngfw.v60_9900.NSFOCUSNGFWService.name: create-ipv6-address-group
nsfocus.ngfw.v60_9900.NSFOCUSNGFWService.description: Create a NETCONF IPv6 address group.

nsfocus.ngfw.v60_9900.NSFOCUSNGFWService.name: delete-ipv6-address-group
nsfocus.ngfw.v60_9900.NSFOCUSNGFWService.description: Delete a NETCONF IPv6 address group by name.

nsfocus.ngfw.v60_9900.NSFOCUSNGFWService.name: add-ipv6-to-group
nsfocus.ngfw.v60_9900.NSFOCUSNGFWService.description: Add IPv6 host entries into a NETCONF IPv6 address group.

nsfocus.ngfw.v60_9900.NSFOCUSNGFWService.name: remove-ipv6-from-group
nsfocus.ngfw.v60_9900.NSFOCUSNGFWService.description: Remove IPv6 host entries from a NETCONF IPv6 address group.
